title: Cities’ review of the sustainable development goals and insights from voluntary local reviews

meta_data.Data_Name: Voluntary Local Review reports dataset compiled from online repositories
meta_data.Data_summary: A corpus of municipal Voluntary Local Review report documents on cities SDG follow up and review, downloaded from multiple international repositories and used as the primary input for content analysis and coding of outcome based and action based review indicators and derived review scores.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We retrieved these reports from four international databases UCLG IGES’ VLR Lab UNDESA and UN HABITAT, and duplicate reports were removed to create a dataset of unique reports. Location: Methods VLR reports included in the study, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: UCLG online database of Voluntary Local Review reports
meta_data.Data_summary: An online repository maintained by United Cities and Local Governments that hosts Voluntary Local Review report files submitted by local governments, used to retrieve VLR documents for the study corpus.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We retrieved these reports from four international databases UCLG IGES’ VLR Lab UNDESA and UN HABITAT. Location: Methods VLR reports included in the study, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: IGES VLR Lab repository of Voluntary Local Review reports
meta_data.Data_summary: An online repository hosted by the Institute for Global Environmental Strategies VLR Lab containing Voluntary Local Review report documents, used as a source to download VLRs for analysis.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We retrieved these reports from four international databases UCLG IGES’ VLR Lab UNDESA and UN HABITAT. Location: Methods VLR reports included in the study, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: UNDESA online database of Voluntary Local Review reports
meta_data.Data_summary: An online repository associated with UNDESA that provides access to publicly available Voluntary Local Review reports, used to obtain VLR report documents for the study dataset.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We retrieved these reports from four international databases UCLG IGES’ VLR Lab UNDESA and UN HABITAT. Location: Methods VLR reports included in the study, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: UN-Habitat online repository of Voluntary Local Review reports
meta_data.Data_summary: An online repository maintained by UN-Habitat that hosts Voluntary Local Review report files, used to download VLR documents included in the study corpus.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We retrieved these reports from four international databases UCLG IGES’ VLR Lab UNDESA and UN HABITAT. Location: Methods VLR reports included in the study, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: United Nations Statistics Division country classification and geoscheme
meta_data.Data_summary: A UN Statistics Division classification system for grouping countries into regions and subregions, used to assign each city report to geographic region categories for analysis and visualization.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The broader geographic region category was based on the United Nations Statistics Division classification of countries. Location: Methods Coding and data processing, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: Author-created VLR coding dataset with ORI and ARI indicators and review scores
meta_data.Data_summary: A structured dataset created by the authors from manual coding of each VLR report, containing dichotomous variables for each SDG indicating outcome based review and action based review, plus aggregated review score variables used as dependent variables in descriptive statistics and linear mixed models.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The coding and analysis derived from these reports are available from the corresponding author upon reasonable request. Location: Extra info Data availability, Confidence: high
